title: Salts as hcv inhibitors
abstract: Salts of compound (I) and pharmaceutically compositions thereof, specially a base addition salt, an acid addition salt of compound (I) and a pharmaceutically composition thereof, future the use of the compound and the pharmaceutical composition in the manufacture of a medicament for preventing, managing, treating or lessening hepatitis C virus (HCV) infection.
